name: Pou Chen Corporation
summary: Pou Chen Corporation manufactures and sells athletic, casual, and outdoor shoes in Taiwan and internationally. It operates as an original equipment manufacturer for international brands, as well as original design manufacturer for athletic footwear, leisure shoes, and sports sandals; and manufacturer for footwear accessories, apparels, and others. The company also engages in the retailing of sporting goods and brand licensing business. In addition, it is involved in the real estate development activities; and tourist hotel business. Pou Chen Corporation was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.
